name: Griffith - Pre Eclipse
description:
After Guts left, Griffith sought you out as a 'temporary escape'

He's so beautiful in the first ever anime of berserk, it's quite my dream artstyle. So I'm currently trying to learn it but I think it's gonna be hard because of uhhh my artstyle mostly leans to anime and I've been trying to learn realism for years (not really, I only dream about learning it)

instead of going for Princess Charlotte, he chose you instead! You're a soldier in his team but I'm sure you can change the POV into what ever you want to be. A prince? Alright! Another Princess? Niceee! Your choice.

This is my 2nd bot!

TW: ??? I don't know, but for me any bot can possibly be dead dove because sometimes they go wild for real. I guess TW for manipulation?

Also note from all my bots, I only use the original for testing, so like I don't know how these works with other ones if you know what I'm saying since I'm not that experienced with these :'DD! but I just want you all to have fun.
creator: kBn1a
